visual_description: The man with a bloody wound on his forehead lies on his back on a concrete floor, eyes open and looking upward, wearing a blue shirt and a yellow jacket. Then a woman with dark curly hair is seen bending over, holding a white plastic bag near her face. Finally, bright flames engulf a surface, illuminating the scene with intense orange and yellow fire.
